image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: shaking, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S042. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Both Lin Ches reach for the red mug simultaneously.; The mug wobbles between them, its surface reflecting fragmented memories. narration intent: Narrator explains "两个人同时伸手，红杯在中间摇晃，杯中映出两段记忆。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "到底谁是真的？". shot positive notes: Close-up of two hands reaching for a red mug, mug shaking, reflections in the liquid, dramatic tension, shallow depth of field, warm amber light.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: shaking, must remain visually consistent. shot S042. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Both Lin Ches reach for the red mug simultaneously.; The mug wobbles between them, its surface reflecting fragmented memories. narration intent: Narrator explains "两个人同时伸手，红杯在中间摇晃，杯中映出两段记忆。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "到底谁是真的？". shot positive notes: Close-up of two hands reaching for a red mug, mug shaking, reflections in the liquid, dramatic tension, shallow depth of field, warm amber light.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, out of focus, extra objects, flat lighting, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 两个人同时伸手，红杯在中间摇晃，杯中映出两段记忆。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
